anomalies: indigo-plateau, route-2: no location-map exists in the data layer's image catalog (crystal-ap-tracker), so mapImage was omitted rather than guessed — not a content gap.

c10 (S.S. Aqua): the route source (src-bulba-walkthrough Part 16) heads the boarding step under "New Bark Town" while its own S.S. Aqua description states the ship runs between Olivine City and Vermilion City — a minor internal inconsistency in the source; the boarding is reproduced as the S.S. Aqua to Vermilion without over-specifying the dock town.

notes: Full extraction of all 20 chapters (c1–c20) from src-bulba-walkthrough Parts 1–29, cross-checked against the data layer (locations, achievements) and the RA wiki. 92 locations, 117 visits, 184 steps.

Chapter granularity = one badge/story arc per chapter (20 total); multi-floor dungeons and gyms fold into their parent place — both confirmed by Pierre 2026-06-17. Location maps drawn from the data layer's location-map catalog (crystal-ap-tracker) and copied into images/.

Source-order correction vs. the provisional outline: Pryce's Glacier Badge falls in Part 11 (c6, Mahogany), and the Kanto badge order is Volcano (Blaine, c17) before Earth (Blue, c18), matching the walkthrough's pagination. Chapter titles were adjusted accordingly.

Revisits modelled as new visits sharing a locationId: New Bark Town (v1–v4), Goldenrod City (v1–v3), Ecruteak City (v1–v3), Olivine City (v1–v2), Mahogany Town (v1–v4), Cherrygrove/Violet/Cerulean/Saffron/Vermilion/Lavender/Viridian/Pallet/Tin Tower/Mt. Mortar all revisited. The Team Rocket hideout, Sprout Tower, Slowpoke Well, Dragon's Den, Whirl Islands, etc. are their own locations; gyms and Mr. Pokémon's house fold into their city/route, matching how the data layer files trainers/items.

91 achievementRefs attached only where the earning step is unambiguous (gym/badge clears, story beats, gift/trade/static-catch achievements). Catch-based Oak achievements tied to wild encounters, and the conditional set-style/single-Pokémon challenge achievements, are left for the ra-mapping pass to place precisely.

6 missable steps flagged with deadlines: starter choice (c1), red Gyarados catch (c6), Suicune at Tin Tower (c7), the Dragon Shrine ExtremeSpeed Dratini (c8), and the Ho-Oh and Lugia catches (c20). No source gaps, so no steps carry confidence: flagged.
SAMPLE GATE (c1) was signed off by Pierre before full extraction.
